---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
server: shiny
---

---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
server: shiny
---

In this Quarto document, we create four embedded MongoDB databases from four existing SQL DynLib databases. We transform the relational structure of the SQL databases into a collection-based NoSQL structure.

```{r}
library(RSQLite)
library(mongolite)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(stringi)

```

```{}
```

```{r}
#define SQLite documents
sqlite_files <- c("data/Dylib_FTMS_neg_or.sqlite", 
                  "data/Dylib_FTMS_pos2.sqlite",
                  "data/Dylib_QTOF_neg.sqlite", 
                  "data/Dylib_QTOF_pos.sqlite")

#giving names for the resulting MongoDb databases
mongo_dbs <- c("Dylib_FTMS_neg_mongo", "Dylib_FTMS_pos_mongo",
               "Dylib_QTOF_neg_mongo", "Dylib_QTOF_pos_mongo")

#giving names for the resulting MongoDb collections
mongo_collections <- c("coll_FTMS_neg", "coll_FTMS_pos", 
                       "coll_QTOF_neg", "coll_QTOF_pos")

```

```{r}

# Cleaning columns
clean_utf8 <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(col) {
    if (is.character(col)) stri_encode(col, "", "UTF-8") else col
  })
  return(df)
}

```

```{r}
# Create a folder for saving the resulting json files
json_dir <- "data/embaded_json"
if (!dir.exists(json_dir)) {
  dir.create(json_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
batch_size <- 1000

# Loop on each sqlite file
for (i in seq_along(sqlite_files)) {
  sqlite_file <- sqlite_files[i]
  mongo_db <- mongo_dbs[i]
  mongo_collection <- mongo_collections[i]

  message("\n Processing ", basename(sqlite_file))

  con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), sqlite_file)
  #Data Cleaning
  experiment_tbl <- dbReadTable(con, "experiment") %>% clean_utf8()
  msms_spectrum_tbl <- dbReadTable(con, "msms_spectrum") %>% clean_utf8()
  msms_peak_tbl <- dbReadTable(con, "msms_spectrum_peak") %>% clean_utf8()
  compound_tbl <- dbReadTable(con, "ms_compound") %>% clean_utf8()

  # Import experiment table in a single mongoDB collection
  mongo_exp <- mongo(collection = "experiment", db = mongo_db)
  mongo_exp$remove('{}')
  mongo_exp$insert(experiment_tbl)
  message("Experiment collection inserted with ", nrow(experiment_tbl), " documents")

  # group by spectrum_id in Peaks table
  peaks_by_spec <- split(msms_peak_tbl, msms_peak_tbl$spectrum_id)
  # group by compound_id in ms_compound table
  compound_by_id <- split(compound_tbl, compound_tbl$compound_id)

  # Documents construction and linking
  link_docs <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(msms_spectrum_tbl)), function(idx) {
    spec_row <- as.list(msms_spectrum_tbl[idx, , drop = FALSE])
    spec_id <- spec_row$spectrum_id
    cmp_id <- spec_row$compound_id

    # create Peaks field in msms_spectrum and fill it by Peaks information
    #of each spectrum id
    peaks <- peaks_by_spec[[as.character(spec_id)]]
    if (!is.null(peaks)) {
      spec_row$peaks <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(peaks)), function(j) as.list(peaks[j, , drop = FALSE]))
    } else {
      spec_row$peaks <- list()
    }

    # create compound field in msms_spectrum and fill it by compound information
    #of each compound id
    compound <- compound_by_id[[as.character(cmp_id)]]
    if (!is.null(compound)) {
      spec_row$compound <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(compound)), function(j) as.list(compound[j, , drop = FALSE]))
    } else {
      spec_row$compound <- NULL
    }

    return(spec_row)
  })

  # Insertion in MongoDB
  mongo_conn <- mongo(collection = mongo_collection, db = mongo_db)
  mongo_conn$remove('{}')

  # Save json files locally 
  output_file <- file.path(json_dir, paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(sqlite_file)), ".json"))
  file_conn <- file(output_file, open = "wt", encoding = "UTF-8")
  on.exit(close(file_conn), add = TRUE)

  batches <- split(link_docs, ceiling(seq_along(link_docs) / batch_size))
  for (batch in batches) {
    json_docs <- vapply(
      batch,
      FUN = function(doc) {
        tryCatch(
          toJSON(doc, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null", POSIXt = "ISO8601", na = "null"),
          error = function(e) {
            warning("Invalid JSON: ", conditionMessage(e))
            NA_character_
          }
        )
      },
      FUN.VALUE = character(1)
    )

    valid_docs <- json_docs[!is.na(json_docs)]
    if (length(valid_docs) > 0) {
      mongo_conn$insert(valid_docs, parse = TRUE)
      writeLines(valid_docs, con = file_conn)
    }

    message(length(valid_docs), " valid documents inserted in this batch")
    if (any(is.na(json_docs))) {
      message(sum(is.na(json_docs)), " invalid documents skipped in this batch")
    }
  }

  message("MongoDB import done for DB: ", mongo_db, " / Collection: ", mongo_collection)
  dbDisconnect(con)
}



```

**Data Manipulation**

```{r}
library(mongolite)
#Connexion to the Dylib_FTMS_neg_or database
coll <- mongo(collection = "coll_FTMS_neg", db = "Dylib_FTMS_neg_mongo")
data <- coll$find()
head(data)

```

```{r}
# Count the number of document in ms_compound collection (201034)
nb_documents <- coll$count()
nb_documents 
```

```{r}
# Print the first document in compound field
doc <- coll$find(limit = 1)
print(doc$compound)
```

```{r}
# Print the first document in peaks field
doc_pk <- coll$find(limit = 1)
print(doc_pk$peaks)
```

```{r}
# find the documents where compound.expid field is equal to 18
result <- coll$find('{"compound.expid": 18}', limit = 4)
print(result)
```

```{r}
library(mongolite)
#Connexion to the experiment collection of the Dylib_FTMS_neg_or database
coll_exp <- mongo(collection = "experiment", db = "Dylib_FTMS_neg_mongo")
data <- coll_exp$find()
head(data)


```

```{r}
# Count the number of document in ms_compound collection (265)
nb_doc_exp <- coll_exp$count()
nb_doc_exp 

```

```{r}
# Get the first document
# Print the first document in experiment collection
doc_exp <- coll_exp$find(limit = 1)
print(doc_exp)

```

```{r}
# find the documents where expid field is equal to 18
exp18 <- coll_exp$find('{"expid": 18}', limit = 4)
print(exp18)
```

```{r}
#Connexion to the experiment collection of the Dylib_FTMS_neg_or database
coll_qpos <- mongo(collection = "coll_QTOF_pos", db = "Dylib_QTOF_pos_mongo")
data <- coll_qpos$find()
head(data)
```

```{r}
# Print the first document in compound field
doc_qpos <- coll_qpos$find(limit = 1)
print(doc_qpos$compound)
```

```{r}
# Count the number of document in ms_compound collection (6237)
nb_doc_qpos <- coll_qpos$count()
nb_doc_qpos 
```

```{r}
# Print the first document in peaks field
doc_pk_qpos <- coll_qpos$find(limit = 1)
print(doc_pk_qpos$peaks)
```

```{r}
# Print the first document in compound field
doc_cmp_qpos <- coll_qpos$find(limit = 1)
print(doc_cmp_qpos$compound)
```
